description: Bun + TypeScript webapp scaffold with Vitest, oxlint, Prettier, and Husky

userStories.title: Scaffold complete Bun/TypeScript project
userStories.description:
SCAFFOLDING STORY — This is a deterministic file-creation task, NOT feature development. Create ALL files listed below with their EXACT contents, run `bun install`, then verify. Do NOT write tests for file existence — these are config files, not application code. Just create them and verify the toolchain works.

Create ALL of the following files in a single pass:

### 1. `package.json`
```json
{
  "name": "__PROJECT_NAME__",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "bun run --watch src/index.ts",
    "build": "bun build src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node",
    "test": "bun run vitest run",
    "test:watch": "bun run vitest",
    "typecheck": "bunx tsc --noEmit",
    "lint": "oxlint src/",
    "prepare": "husky"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "bun-types": "latest",
    "husky": "^9.1.7",
    "lint-staged": "^16.0.0",
    "oxlint": "^1.50.0",
    "prettier": "^3.4.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.0",
    "vitest": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "prettier": {
    "semi": true,
    "trailingComma": "es5",
    "singleQuote": false,
    "printWidth": 80,
    "tabWidth": 2
  }
}
```

### 2. `tsconfig.json`
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "NodeNext",
    "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
    "types": ["bun-types"],
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
}
```

### 3. `vitest.config.ts`
```typescript
import { defineConfig } from "vitest/config";

export default defineConfig({
  test: {
    globals: true,
    environment: "node",
    include: ["src/**/*.test.ts", "src/**/*.spec.ts"],
    passWithNoTests: true,
    coverage: {
      provider: "v8",
      reporter: ["text", "json-summary"],
    },
  },
});
```

### 4. `.oxlintrc.json`
```json
{
  "$schema": "./node_modules/oxlint/configuration_schema.json",
  "categories": {
    "correctness": "error",
    "suspicious": "warn"
  }
}
```

### 5. `.prettierrc`
```json
{
  "semi": true,
  "trailingComma": "es5",
  "singleQuote": false,
  "printWidth": 80,
  "tabWidth": 2
}
```

### 6. `.lintstagedrc`
```json
{
  "*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}": "oxlint",
  "*": "prettier --ignore-unknown --write"
}
```

### 7. `src/index.ts`
```typescript
export {};
```

### 8. `.gitignore`
```
# Dependencies
node_modules/

# Build output
dist/
build/
.next/
out/

# Environment
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

# Data / databases
data/
*.db
*.sqlite

# IDE / OS
.DS_Store
*.swp
.idea/
.vscode/

# TypeScript
tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
next-env.d.ts

# Test / coverage
coverage/

# Logs
*.log
logs/

# Ralph internals
.ralph-call-count
.ralph-last-error

# Eval runs
evals/runs/

# Puppeteer / PDF output
output/

# Bun
bun.lockb

# Docker
.dockerignore
```

### 9. `CLAUDE.md`
```markdown
# __PROJECT_NAME__

## Commands

- `bun run dev` — watch mode (`bun run --watch src/index.ts`)
- `bun run test` — run tests (Vitest)
- `bun run typecheck` — TypeScript type checking
- `bun run lint` — linting (oxlint)

## Codebase Patterns

(Patterns will be added here by Ralph during iterations)

<!-- Ralph --> Read .ralph/CLAUDE-ralph.md for autonomous development loop instructions.
```

### 10. `.husky/pre-commit` (must be executable)
```bash
bunx lint-staged
bun run typecheck
bun run test
```

## After creating all files:
1. Run `bun install`
2. Run `bun run test` — must pass
3. Run `bun run typecheck` — must pass with zero errors
4. Run `bun run lint` — must pass
5. Commit all files
acceptanceCriteria: `bun run typecheck` passes with zero errors
userStories.notes: This is a scaffolding story. Create all files in one pass using the exact contents above. Do not write unit tests for config file existence — verify by running the toolchain commands.
